  • Uses of Checklist in controller

    Methods in controller with parameters of type Checklist
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    WorkspacePageController.onDeleteItemRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
    Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the specified checklist.
    void
    ChecklistPageController.onDeleteListRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
    Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the given checklist.
    void
    WorkspacePageController.onEditItemRequested(Checklist itemToEdit)
    Displays a dialog allowing the user to rename the given checklist.
    void
    WorkspacePageController.onItemSelected(Checklist selectedList)
    Handles the event when a checklist is selected.
    void
    AppController.showChecklistPage(Checklist checklist)
    Displays the checklist page in the main window and updates its contents.

    Defines an alias of ICollectionPageListener for handling user interactions on the workspace page.

    Method

    IChecklistPageListener.onDeleteListRequested(Checklist listToDelete)

    Subclasses with type arguments of type Checklist in model
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Workspace
    Defines a workspace that maintains multiple Checklist items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.

    CreateChecklistDialog.getEditedData()

  • Uses of Checklist in view.pages

    Subclasses with type arguments of type Checklist in view.pages
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ChecklistPage
    Defines a page that displays and manages a Checklist, showing its associated Tasks either as cards or as text.
    class 
    WorkspacePage
    Defines a page view that displays a Workspace and its associated list of Checklists.
    Methods in view.pages that return types with arguments of type Checklist
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected AbstractDataPanel<Checklist>
    WorkspacePage.buildDataPanel(Checklist checklist)
    Creates and returns a ChecklistPanel to display the checklist and provide item-level interactions.
